title: You Won't Miss Turf War: Splatoon Raiders Just Made Me a Looter-Shooter Believer
summary: The answer, to be reductive, is that Splatoon Raiders is Nintendo's take on a looter-shooter, a Splatoon version of Borderlands or Destiny . Even as a solo game, Splatoon Raiders encourages teamwork.
caption: output/2026-07-23/you-won-t-miss-turf-war-splatoon-raiders-just-made-me-a-looter-shooter.txt
